description: Platform Modernization - migrate the legacy Win32/MySQL/GDI MeOS codebase into a modular, cross-platform stack: domain library, SQLite persistence, JSON REST API, React frontend, and bundled C++ executable. Each story is a single-iteration migration step; generated code is disposable between Ralph runs.

userStories.title: Modular Source Layout
userStories.description: As a developer, I want source code organized in logical modules so that the codebase is navigable and each layer has clear boundaries.
acceptanceCriteria: `src/` directory contains subdirectories: app/, domain/, net/, db/, util/, io/
CMake targets defined per module (static libraries + main executable)
Module dependencies are explicit in CMake with no circular dependencies
Header include paths configured so bare `#include "oBase.h"` resolves within modules
`VCPKG_ROOT=... cmake --preset default` configures and `cmake --build build` succeeds
userStories.notes: src/io/ stub module added; all 12 tests pass.

userStories.title: Domain Foundation â€” oBase, oDataContainer, domain_header
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the foundational base classes (oBase, oDataContainer) and shared domain_header migrated to src/domain/ so that all other entities can build on a portable foundation.
acceptanceCriteria: `domain_header.h` defines common enums, forward declarations, and Win32 shims (`__int64`, `wcsncpy_s`, `_i64toa_s`)
Stub `oEvent.h` exists with the minimal interface required by oDataContainer
Domain library compiles with dependency on `util` only (no `db`, `net`, `io`)
Unit tests for oBase basics pass
userStories.notes: oBase, oDataContainer, oDataInterface, oDataConstInterface, domain_header.h, oEvent.h stub, datadefiners.h added to src/domain/. Map-based DataMap storage replaces binary buffers. 13 unit tests pass.

userStories.title: Domain â€” oControl Migration
userStories.description: As a developer, I want oControl migrated to src/domain/ with stubs for its downstream dependents so that control entities work in the new layout.
acceptanceCriteria: Win32 string functions replaced with `meos_util` equivalents
userStories.notes: oControl.h/cpp migrated to src/domain/ with DataMap pattern. SpecialPunch available via oPunch.h. Stubs added for oPunch, oCourse, oClass, oRunner, oCard, oFreePunch. Time utility shims (formatTimeMS, convertAbsoluteTimeMS, NOTIME, SubSecond, itow, makeDash) added to domain_header.h. oEvent stub extended with getRevision(), setupControlStatistics(), formatScore(), convertScore(), punchIndex. 28 unit tests pass.

userStories.title: Domain â€” oPunch Migration
userStories.description: As a developer, I want oPunch migrated to src/domain/ so that punch time handling and control matching are available to other entities.
acceptanceCriteria: Punch time handling and control matching preserved
userStories.notes: oPunch.h/cpp migrated to src/domain/ with DataMap pattern. time constants, formatTime, convertAbsoluteTimeHMS, _EmptyWString added to domain_header.h. oEvent stub extended with getAbsTime, getUnitAdjustment, getRelativeTime, getZeroTimeNum. oCourse stub extended with getStartPunchType, getFinishPunchType, getControl. domain_stubs.cpp cleaned of oPunch stub. 25 unit tests pass.

userStories.title: Domain â€” oClub Migration
userStories.description: As a developer, I want oClub migrated to src/domain/ with shared enums centralized so that club entities are available for downstream stories.
acceptanceCriteria: `oClub` data fields initialized correctly in stub oEvent ctor
Compact-name algorithm, ShortName override, and assignInvoiceNumber work as in legacy
userStories.notes: oClub.h/cpp migrated to src/domain/ with DataMap pattern. src/util/common_enums.h created with cVacantId/cNoClubId. _wcsicmp and using std::map added to domain_header.h. Compact-name algorithm, ShortName override, assignInvoiceNumber all implemented. 30 unit tests pass.

userStories.title: Domain â€” oCourse Migration
userStories.description: As a developer, I want oCourse migrated to src/domain/ so that classes can reference courses with the correct control sequence.
acceptanceCriteria: Length, climb, and course properties preserved
oEvent stub exposes `getControl(id, create, includeVirtual)` for course operations
Unit tests for oCourse operations pass
userStories.notes: oCourse.h/cpp migrated to src/domain/ with DataMap pattern. oEvent stub extended with getControl(id,create,includeVirtual) and getFreeCourseId(). domain_stubs.cpp cleaned of oCourse stub. 65 unit tests pass.

userStories.title: Domain â€” oClass Core Migration
userStories.description: As a developer, I want oClass core (entity, course assignment, oData alignment) migrated to src/domain/ so that classes are available for runners and teams.
acceptanceCriteria: `oData` buffer correctly aligned for 4-byte wchar_t on Linux

userStories.title: Domain â€” Class Configuration + Qualifications
userStories.description: As a developer, I want classconfiginfo, qualifications, and start method logic migrated so that class start formats (individual, mass, pursuit) work.
acceptanceCriteria: Start methods (individual, mass, pursuit, etc.) preserved

userStories.title: Domain â€” oClass Unit Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want comprehensive unit tests for oClass operations so that class behavior is locked down.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit tests for class-course assignment pass
Unit tests for start methods and leg info pass
Unit tests for fee calculation and configuration pass

userStories.title: Domain â€” oCard Migration
userStories.description: As a developer, I want oCard migrated to src/domain/ so that card readout entities are available for runner result evaluation.
acceptanceCriteria: Card-punch matching logic preserved via punchString serialization round-trip

userStories.title: Domain â€” oFreePunch Migration + Card Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want oFreePunch migrated and unit tests for card operations so that free punch handling works end-to-end.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit tests for oCard and oFreePunch operations pass

userStories.title: Domain â€” oRunner Core Migration
userStories.description: As a developer, I want oRunner and oAbstractRunner migrated to src/domain/ so that runner entities and shared runner/team logic are available.
acceptanceCriteria: `oAbstractRunner` extracted to own header with shared logic for oTeam
`oRunnerData` fields initialized in oEvent ctor before any oRunner is created

userStories.title: Domain â€” Runner Status + Split Times + Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want runner status computation (evaluateCard) and split times implemented with tests so that runner results can be computed.
acceptanceCriteria: Status computation (OK, DNS, DNF, DSQ, MP) works via evaluateCard
Unit tests for runner status, splits, and result computation pass

userStories.title: Domain â€” oTeam Core Migration
userStories.description: As a developer, I want oTeam migrated to src/domain/ so that relay/team entities and runner membership work.
acceptanceCriteria: `using oAbstractRunner::getTotalStatus;` resolves name hiding in oTeam

userStories.title: Domain â€” Relay Leg Computation + Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want relay leg computation and team status propagation working with tests so that relay scoring is correct.
acceptanceCriteria: Team status propagation through legs works (no incorrect StatusUnknown when leg has tStatus set)
Unit tests for team operations pass

userStories.title: Domain â€” oEvent Core: Collections + Lifecycle
userStories.description: As a developer, I want oEvent.cpp core migrated so that entity collections, competition lifecycle, and lookup methods replace the skeleton stub.
acceptanceCriteria: `oEvent.cpp` full implementation replaces the skeleton stub
oEvent owns and manages all entity collections (Controls, Courses, Classes, Runners, Teams, Cards, Clubs, punches)
Competition create/open/save lifecycle works (`newCompetition` clears all collections)

userStories.title: Domain â€” oEventDraw + oEventResult + Integration Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want drawing, result orchestration, and integration tests migrated so that oEvent is functionally complete.
acceptanceCriteria: `oEventDraw.cpp` â€” class drawing and start list generation works
Integration tests covering entity relationships through oEvent pass

userStories.title: Domain â€” GeneralResult Scoring Engine
userStories.description: As a developer, I want generalresult.h/cpp migrated with the strategy pattern for pluggable scoring algorithms so that custom result calculations work.
acceptanceCriteria: Strategy pattern for scoring algorithms preserved
`DynamicResult` compiles with required oRunner/oTeam stubs (`getSplitAnalysis`, `getLegTimeAfter`, `getBirthAge`, etc.)

userStories.title: Domain â€” MetaList + oListInfo + Result Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want metalist output formatting and oListInfo migrated with comprehensive result tests so that result formatting works for individual and relay formats.
acceptanceCriteria: Result computation produces correct results for individual and relay formats
Unit tests for result computation with known test data pass

userStories.title: Domain Cleanup â€” Remove Stubs + Verify
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all temporary stubs removed and the domain layer verified to compile cleanly with no Win32 dependencies so that the migration is complete.
acceptanceCriteria: All temporary stubs (gdioutput stub, oSpeaker stub, Table stub, MeOSFeatures stub) removed or replaced with proper interfaces
No `#ifdef _WIN32` guards in domain code (except `win_types.h` shims)
No direct Win32/GDI includes in domain code
Domain library compiles on Linux (and remains compilable on Windows)

userStories.title: DB â€” SQLite Abstraction + Connection + Migrations
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a SQLite-backed persistence layer with connection management and a migration system so that schema evolves cleanly.
acceptanceCriteria: Migration system uses a `_migrations` table and supports atomic apply with transactions
Initial schema (V1) for runners and clubs
Failed migration rolls back and leaves `_migrations` at the last good version
Unit tests for database operations and migrations pass

userStories.title: DB â€” Schema for Simple Entities (Clubs, Controls, Courses)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want schema and CRUD repositories for clubs, controls, and courses so that simple entities are persisted.
acceptanceCriteria: Schema migration adds tables for clubs, controls, courses (V2)
Repository/DAO pattern for each entity with insert/get/update/delete
`oData` BLOB persistence used for entities that have it
Semicolon-separated string used for course control sequence (matches legacy)
Unit tests for each entity's CRUD operations pass

userStories.title: DB â€” Schema for Complex Entities (Runners, Classes, Cards, Punches)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want schema and CRUD for runners, classes, cards, punches, and free punches with FK relationships so that complex entities are persisted correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Schema migration adds tables for runners, classes, cards, punches, free punches (V3)
Foreign key relationships enforced (club, class, course references)
Null/0 FK values handled (use `DbParam::Null()` when domain value is 0)
Relationship loading respects dependency order (independent entities first)
Unit tests for complex entity operations pass

userStories.title: DB â€” Schema for Events + Teams
userStories.description: As a developer, I want event and team persistence so that competition metadata and relay teams round-trip through the database.
acceptanceCriteria: Schema migration adds tables for events and teams (V4)
Team-runner membership persisted (semicolon-separated runner IDs OK)
Event metadata (name, date, zeroTime, properties) persisted with single-row `INSERT OR REPLACE` upsert
Full integration test: create event â†’ add entities â†’ close â†’ reopen â†’ query back
SQLite database stored as a single file in the working directory

userStories.title: API â€” Framework + Error Handling
userStories.description: As a frontend developer, I want an HTTP server, routing, JSON serialization, and consistent error handling so that subsequent endpoint stories have a foundation to build on.
acceptanceCriteria: HTTP server (cpp-httplib) integrated and starts in a background thread
Route registration pattern established (path params via regex captures)
JSON request parsing and response serialization via nlohmann-json
Consistent error response envelope with error codes
Input validation framework with meaningful error messages
Error handler does not overwrite handler-set bodies
Unit tests for routing and error handling pass

userStories.title: API â€” Club + Control Endpoints
userStories.description: As a frontend developer, I want CRUD endpoints for clubs and controls so that the GUI can manage these simple entities.
acceptanceCriteria: Created entities are persisted via repository (auto-assigned IDs returned)
Integration tests for each endpoint pass

userStories.title: API â€” Course + Class Endpoints
userStories.description: As a frontend developer, I want CRUD endpoints for courses and classes including their relationships so that competition structure can be managed.
acceptanceCriteria: Class-course assignment in requests/responses (courseId: 0 clears the link)
`oCourse::getControls()` (semicolons) used for control IDs â€” not `getControlNumbers()`

userStories.title: API â€” Runner + Team + Competition Endpoints
userStories.description: As a frontend developer, I want CRUD endpoints for runners and teams with filtering and pagination, plus competition metadata endpoints, so that the GUI can manage the full participant model.
acceptanceCriteria: Filtering by name, club, and class on list endpoints

userStories.title: API â€” Competition Operations (Results, Start Lists, Card Readout)
userStories.description: As a frontend developer, I want API endpoints for competition-specific operations so that the GUI supports the full competition workflow.
acceptanceCriteria: `GET /api/v1/results` returns computed results (per class and overall)
`GET /api/v1/startlist` returns start lists sorted by classId, then startTime
`POST /api/v1/cards` handles card readout (constructs oCard, adds punches, links to runner, triggers evaluateCard)
`POST /api/v1/runners/{id}/status` allows manual status changes (DNS, DNF, DSQ)
Result computation uses existing `GeneralResult` logic via `oe.calculateResults`
Endpoints support both preliminary and final results
Server threads are joined cleanly on shutdown

userStories.title: Static File Serving from C++ Server
userStories.description: As a user, I want the C++ executable to serve the React frontend so that no separate web server is needed.
acceptanceCriteria: C++ HTTP server serves static files from a bundled `web/` directory via `set_mount_point`
`index.html` served at `/` with SPA fallback (non-API 404s for GET serve `index.html` with status 200)
API 404s under `/api/` bypass the SPA fallback
Gzip compression enabled (cpp-httplib `zlib` feature in vcpkg.json)
React production build integrated into CMake (`add_custom_target` + `add_dependencies`) and skipped gracefully if npm is missing

userStories.title: Remove Win32 GUI Code from Migrated Modules
userStories.description: As a developer, I want Win32-specific GUI code removed from the new src/ modules so that the codebase is fully platform-independent.
acceptanceCriteria: No `Tab*.cpp/h`, `gdioutput.cpp/h`, or other GDI files in `src/`
No Win32-specific APIs (`CreateWindow`, `SendMessage`, `RECT`, etc.) in `src/` core code
No Windows-only headers (`windows.h`, `commctrl.h`) in domain, db, net, or io code
`gdioutput` includes, forward declarations, and method declarations purged from src/ domain files
Application compiles and runs on Linux with no Win32 dependencies

userStories.title: Application Bootstrap (MeosApp)
userStories.description: As a user, I want a single binary that starts an HTTP server, opens the SQLite DB, applies migrations, and serves the React frontend so that running the executable gives a working application.
acceptanceCriteria: `src/app/app.h` defines `MeosApp` class that owns all runtime state
SQLite database opened and migrations applied on startup (default: `meos.sqlite`)
All API route groups registered (clubs, controls, courses, classes, runners, teams, competitions, cards, results, startlist)
HTTP server starts on configurable port (default: 8080)
Startup message printed with URL; clean shutdown on Enter keypress
Application serves React SPA at `http://localhost:<port>/` and API at `/api/v1/*`

userStories.title: Util â€” String Conversions + Exceptions
userStories.description: As a developer, I want meos_util core string functions and meosexception migrated to src/util/ so that other modules can rely on portable string handling.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit tests for string conversion pass

userStories.title: Util â€” File Operations + HLS + Version Functions
userStories.description: As a developer, I want filesystem helpers, the HLS color class, and version functions migrated to src/util/ so that legacy Win32 dependencies are gone.
acceptanceCriteria: `HLS` class migrated with Win32 macros (`WORD`, `BYTE`, `RGB`) replaced by `uint16_t`/`uint8_t` + inline helpers
Unit tests for time formatting and file operations pass

userStories.title: Util â€” XML + CSV Parsers
userStories.description: As a developer, I want xmlparser and csvparser migrated to src/util/ without gdioutput coupling so that I/O modules can use them.
acceptanceCriteria: `checkUTF` handles XML fragments without a declaration
`inplaceDecodeXML` implemented as a static helper in `xmlparser.cpp`
`csvparser.h/cpp` core migrated to `src/util/` (domain-specific imports deferred to io/)
Unit tests for xmlparser and csvparser pass

userStories.title: Util â€” Time Handling (TimeStamp + timeconstants)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want TimeStamp and timeconstants migrated to src/util/ so that time formatting is cross-platform.
acceptanceCriteria: `getStamp(sql)` resizes to actual digits written (no trailing garbage)

userStories.title: Util â€” Localization (i18n)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the localizer migrated to src/util/ with std::ifstream-based resource loading so that translations work cross-platform.
acceptanceCriteria: `addLangResource` takes a file path (wstring) instead of a Win32 resource ID
`oWordList` stubbed (lookup always returns false) until domain dependency is resolved

userStories.title: I/O â€” IOF 3.0 XML Import/Export
userStories.description: As a developer, I want IOF 3.0 XML import/export reimplemented in src/io/ without gdioutput coupling so that competitions can exchange data with other systems.
acceptanceCriteria: `src/io/` contains clean IofXml implementation (NOT a direct port of legacy `iof30interface`)
IOF 3.0 XML import works for runners, classes, clubs, courses
IOF 3.0 XML export works for results and start lists
All time values converted using `timeConstSecond`/`timeConstMinute`/`timeConstHour` from `timeconstants.hpp`
IOF status strings (`OK`, `DidNotFinish`, `MissingPunch`, `Disqualified`, etc.) mapped correctly
Unit tests with sample IOF XML files pass

userStories.title: I/O â€” CSV Import (OE/OS format detection)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want CSV import for runners with OE/OS format detection migrated to src/io/ so that runners can be imported from CSV files.
acceptanceCriteria: CSV import for runners migrated to `src/io/`
OE-CSV and OS-CSV format detection via `iscsv()` heuristic on col[1] (`Descr`/`Namn`/`Descr.`/`Navn` â†’ OS)
Header row always skipped before applying column-count heuristic

userStories.title: I/O â€” CSV Export + Round-Trip Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want CSV export for results/start lists with round-trip tests so that CSV is verified end-to-end.
acceptanceCriteria: CSV export for results/start lists migrated to `src/io/`
Export row vector sized to highest OE column index (â‰Ą46)
Times exported via `formatTimeHMS`; parsed back via `convertAbsoluteTimeHMS(str, getZeroTimeNum())`
Unit tests for CSV round-trip (import â†’ export â†’ re-import) pass

userStories.title: I/O â€” HTML Result Generation
userStories.description: As a developer, I want HTML output for results/lists reimplemented in src/io/ without gdioutput coupling so that HTML exports work cross-platform.
acceptanceCriteria: Clean HTML template engine in `src/io/` (NOT a direct port of `HTMLWriter`)
`.template` parser handles `@MEOS EXPORT TEMPLATE` header, `@HEAD`/`@OUTERPAGE`/`@INNERPAGE`/`@SEPARATOR`/`@END`, `%` comments, `@USETABLE`
Output file written via UTF-8 path (`toUTF8(filename)`) for Linux `std::ofstream`
Unit tests for HTML output pass

userStories.title: I/O â€” PDF Generation (libharu)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want PDF output via libharu migrated to src/io/ so that PDF results work on Linux and Windows.
acceptanceCriteria: `src/io/` contains PDF writer using libharu (via vcpkg `unofficial-libharu` / `unofficial::libharu::hpdf`)
`hpdf.h` included directly in the header (no `void*` forward declarations)
Standard Type 1 fonts used (Helvetica, Helvetica-Bold, Helvetica-Oblique) with `nullptr` encoding; text passed through `narrow()`
Multi-page support: new page created when `y - lineHeight < kMargin`
Column-width distribution preserves explicit `cell.width`, splits remaining among zero-width columns
Unit tests for PDF generation pass
